review.reviewSummaryCn: 该信号中包含对PFBS的临床影响的暗示，而未明确标识效力和安全性，需进一步审查。

suggestedEdits.report: Perfluorobutanesulfonic acid (PFBS) is detected in environmental matrices and human samples, with implications for human health.
